description: OpenUV provides real-time and forecast ultraviolet index data, ozone data, and related sun-exposure/protection information by location. Its public product site presents it as a JSON API for developers and smart-home integrations.
summary: OpenUV exposes a single authenticated REST/JSON API at `https://api.openuv.io/api/v1`, documented by an OpenAPI spec and authenticated with an API key in the `x-access-token` header.
